meaning: n.关口,峡路,关隘  [军]上校 Col(Colonel)
examples: His successor at SOS was Col. Henry B. Sayler.
Col. Gadhafi and his son Seif are in hiding.
Col Marks' phone call with his wife tore him up.
Marine Lt Col Brennan Byrne has told AP that most of the dead are "military-age men".
Col Gaddafi was killed by rebels after being captured and his corpse was put on public display.
